zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith Pettipool於1725年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州韋克時，她的父親Seth Pettypool25歲，母親Martha Ragsdale26歲。她於大約1746年與William Massey在美國北卡羅來納州韋克結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1755年在美國維吉尼亞州哈利法可享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith Pettipool于1725年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州韋克时，她的父亲Seth Pettypool25岁，母亲Martha Ragsdale26岁。她于大约1746年与William Massey在美国北卡罗来纳州韋克结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1755年在美国弗吉尼亚州哈利法可享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: When Judith Pettipool was born in 1725, in Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial America, her father, Seth Pettypool, was 25 and her mother, Martha Ragsdale, was 26. She married William Massey about 1746, in Wake, North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1755, in Halifax, Virginia, United States, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith Pettipool est née en 1725, à Wake, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Seth Pettypool, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Martha Ragsdale, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Massey environ 1746, à Wake, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1755, à Halifax, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Judith Pettipool 1725 in Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seth Pettypool 25 und ihre Mutter Martha Ragsdale 26. Sie hat um 1746 in Wake, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten William Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1755 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Halifax, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith Pettipoolが1725年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ワクで生まれた時，父Seth Pettypoolは25歳，母Martha Ragsdaleは26歳であった。約1746年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ワクでWilliam Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1755年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハリファックスで30歳で死去した。

ko.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크
ko.lifeSummary: Judith Pettipool(이)가 1725년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seth Pettypool(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Martha Ragsdale(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1746년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 웨이크에서 William Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1755년 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Wake, North Carolina, British Colonial A: веик, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith Pettipool родилась в 1725 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Seth Pettypool было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Ragsdale, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Massey около 1746 г. в местности веик, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1755 г. в местности хэлифакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 30 лет.
